crime.value: Abduction of multiple girls by an unknown perpetrator with a missing middle finger
crime.quote: He had snatched her with his dark, cut up hands. I remember destictly to this day the absence of his middle finger.

victim.value: Maggie and two other girls, abducted while walking at night despite known dangers
victim.quote: Three girls lay, slumped, on a kitchen table; a crop of brown curly hair atop the head of the girl closest to the door.

closed_world.value: Rural area with cobblestone roads and marshy hills where bandits and criminals are known to roam at night
closed_world.quote: our mothers and fathers have cautioned us about bandits and theives and criminals roaming the dusty road at midnight

investigator.value: First-person narrator, Maggie's best friend, who witnesses the abduction and pursues the perpetrator
investigator.quote: I was going to find her, and nothing was going to stop me.

red_herring.value: The narrator's focus on the missing middle finger and 'it' as the abductor may be misdirection from human perpetrator
red_herring.quote: I remember destictly to this day the absence of his middle finger.

clue_fairness.value: Physical details shared with reader: missing middle finger, cobblestone path, marshy hills location, lantern-lit hut
clue_fairness.quote: I remember destictly to this day the absence of his middle finger.

social_world.value: Community with parental authority warning children about nighttime dangers from bandits and criminals
social_world.quote: our mothers and fathers have cautioned us about bandits and theives and criminals roaming the dusty road

media_and_audience.value: Local folklore about dangerous nighttime criminals shapes community perception of the threat
media_and_audience.quote: our mothers and fathers have cautioned us about bandits and theives and criminals roaming the dusty road

investigator_wound.value: Narrator's guilt and trauma from failing to protect best friend Maggie drives desperate rescue attempt
investigator_wound.quote: She had been taken away from me. He had snatched her with his dark, cut up hands.
